stated verbatim in Materials and Methods

media.notes: Grown aerobically at 37C with agitation (batch, growth-curve/RNA-seq), so oxygen is aerobic not facultative. The stated trace solution contains NO iron (and no Mo/Ni/B/Se/W); standard M9 also adds no iron, so the Fe2+/Fe3+ entries in the prior current_components are not supported by the recipe and were dropped. Acetate salt form and exact 100x-stock dilution are not fully specified; conc_mM for acetate assumes sodium acetate at 2 g/L.
